AMIRI Malibu Boot 24 / Early Winter New Shearling Snow Boots  
Crafted with comfortable shearling lining and soft leather stitching, featuring a thickened midsole for added volume and stylish wear. AMIRI logos are placed on the heel, ankle, and toe for enhanced recognition. Designed for warmth and comfort in winter without compromising on fashion, making it a must-have seasonal choice.  
✔️ Material: Custom water-dyed cow suede  
✔️ Lining: Shearling  
✔️ Outsole: Exclusive original two-layer PU composite outsole  
✔️ Sizes: 35-41 (40 and 41 available on order)
